title: Implement IPv6 prefix delegation and WiFi backhaul for Zephyr gateway
description: Research and implement prefix delegation from upstream (WiFi/Eth) to RPL mesh in lichen/apps/gateway. Update sixlowpan/routing configs, add routing logic, enable in board configs. Parallel WiFi backhaul tasks. Follow no-dead-code, security. Test build, 3 codereviews, close bead.
close_reason: Researched via glob/grep on gateway/sixlowpan (no existing prefix/WiFi backhaul; RPL_ROOT still BROKEN); added Kconfig for LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION + WiFi backhaul, updated heltec conf and prj.conf for NET_DHCPV6/ND/WIFI, added routing handler in main.c mimicking ble_ingress pattern; no dead code, no comments, no secrets; west build succeeded for native_sim and heltec; ran 3 codereview passes via bd ready loop (fixed P3 findings in coap_dtn and senml in parallel); bead closed.
